items.caption: A slide from a presentation with a purple header at the top that reads "turning point." below the header, there are two bullet points with text. the first bullet point states, "the family was threatened by a white mob and forced to leave by a court order." the second bullet point says, "carl hansberry took the case to the supreme court where he won a favorable judgment in 1940 (hansberry vs. lee)." to the right of the text is a photograph of the supreme court building in washington, d.c., with a clear blue sky in the background. the building's neoclassical architecture is visible, featuring columns and a pediment. the image is informative, likely used for educational purposes to illustrate a historical event.
